# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud network security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: three-tier-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: web-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
    region: us-central1
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: app-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24
    region: us-central1
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: db-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.3.0/24
    region: us-central1
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

- name: web-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    targetTags:
    - web-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '443'
    logConfig:
      enable: true

- name: app-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
    - web-tier
    targetTags:
    - app-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '8080'
    logConfig:
      enable: true

- name: db-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
    - app-tier
    targetTags:
    - db-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '5432'
    logConfig:
      enable: true

- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: all
    logConfig:
      enable: true

- name: allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 900
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
    - IPProtocol: udp
    - IPProtocol: icmp
    logConfig:
      enable: true
